reviews.comment:
Pésima atención en despacho de combustibles, mqla organización en momentos criticos y abarrotado como un  cambio de quincena. Leyes extrañas de organización y ubicación para los surtidores, luego de hacer 30 minutos de fila me meto en un surtidor libre y resulta que de las 6 mangueras/surtidores  3 estám asociados a gente del pueblo o que vienen de bsas (sin señalización o cartelería) y luego 2 de 3 bombas opetivas a gente que viene de mar del plata.. cabe destacar que si te querés ubicar de manera correcta (tapa de combustible del lado de la bomba) e interpretar las indicaciones del playero.. vas a tardar 1 hora mas o menos.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service at the gas station, disorganized during peak times, and packed like a payday holiday. Strange rules govern the organization and placement of the pumps; after waiting in line for 30 minutes, I finally got to a free pump and found that out of the 6 hoses/pumps, 3 were reserved for locals or people from Buenos Aires (without any signage), and then 2 out of 3 working pumps were reserved for people from Mar del Plata. It's worth noting that if you want to find the correct pump (fuel cap on the pump side) and understand the attendant's instructions, it will take you about an hour.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJODZYci1nRRAB
